title: Refactor REST API to GraphQL
original_text: Refactored REST API to GraphQL. Defined GraphQL schema for all resources. Implemented GraphQL resolvers. Added query batching and caching. Implemented subscriptions for real-time updates. Added GraphQL playground for testing. Migrated frontend to use GraphQL queries. Added tests for GraphQL endpoints. Result: 54 tests pass.
expected_subject: refactor(api): migrate REST API to GraphQL
expected_body_lines: - Define GraphQL schema for all resources
- Add GraphQL playground and migrate frontend
expected_command: git commit -m "refactor(api): migrate REST API to GraphQL"
